title: Dev-Team Coordinator
subtitle: Núcleo Estudantil de Informática do Instituto Superior Técnico
description:
Led development and launch of NEIIST’s new website, including an online shop with SumUp payment support,
processing €3,000+ in transactions. Implemented Notion calendar sync: public activity page for events, and private Google Calendar integration for team
members using Notion webhooks and service accounts for real-time updates.

title: Dev-Team Collaborator
subtitle: Núcleo Estudantil de Informática do Instituto Superior Técnico
description: Organized, created, and conducted a workshop on Git for fellow students. Helping in replacing the deprecated NEIIST website by developing a complete rewrite and redesign in Next.js

title: Software Engineer - Ops
subtitle: FSTLisboa
description:
Developed a Next.js-based quiz platform, deployed with Docker and Caddy on a VPS, enabling the team to practice
for Formula Student qualifier quizzes. Set up STAR-CCM+ on a Linux HPC, implementing an IPv6 proxy solution for secure license server access, and
created a proxy and GUI tool to streamline simulation submissions for the aerodynamics team.

title: Operations Software Trainee
subtitle: FSTLisboa
description:
Developing internal management software to enhance usability and overall experience for the team, focusing on the
Bill of Materials (BOM) system used in Formula Student. Contributing to the development and maintenance of authentication and supporting software required for the web
application (FST - Management System). Assisting with events and other operational matters as needed as an Operations Trainee.

title: Registration Team Member
subtitle: WebSummit Lisbon 2024
description: The first day I assisted with speakers and partners registration, ensuring a smooth check-in process and providing some information about the event. In the second day I was placed on the Analytics & Data Collection team where I helped scanning all people coming into the event.

title: Rowing Summer Camp Coach
subtitle: Clube dos Galitos, Aveiro
description: Responsible for supervising and coaching kids during their morning rowing practice, helping them develop their skills, stay safe, and most importantly, have fun.
